recommendations.title: Den of Thieves 2: Pantera
recommendations.overview: Big Nick is back on the hunt in Europe and closing in on Donnie, who is embroiled in the treacherous and unpredictable world of diamond thieves and the infamous Panther mafia, as they plot a massive heist of the world's largest diamond exchange.

recommendations.title: The Getaway
recommendations.overview: A recently released ex-convict and his loyal wife go on the run after a heist goes wrong.

recommendations.title: The Marine 3: Homefront
recommendations.overview: A Marine must do whatever it takes to save his kidnapped sister and stop a terrorist attack masterminded by a radical militia group.

recommendations.title: Overdrive
recommendations.overview: Master car thieves square off against French gangsters in the South of France with money, women and lives all on the line.

recommendations.title: The Doorman

recommendations.title: Logorama
recommendations.overview: Two cops portrayed by Michelin Men chase an armed Ronald McDonald through the streets of a fictionalized, stylized city.
recommendations.director: Ludovic Houplain, François Alaux, Hervé de Crécy

recommendations.title: The Diamond Arm
recommendations.overview: A diamond smuggling operation goes wrong when an ordinary Soviet citizen becomes unwittingly involved, and the criminals are forced to court him to retrieve their diamonds.

recommendations.title: 44 Inch Chest
recommendations.overview: Colin is in agony, shattered by his wife’s infidelity, so his friends kidnap the wife's lover so he can have his revenge.

recommendations.title: The Mission
